name: Korean Orange-Flavored Bean Sauce
recipeIngredient: Freshly grated peel of 1 small orange
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, combine the Korean-style bean paste, red wine vinegar, fresh orange juice, and sugar.
2. Add freshly grated orange peel to the mixture.
3. Mix all ingredients until smooth.
4. Serve immediately or cover and refrigerate until ready to use.
5. Variation: Use red peppers instead of oranges for a different flavor profile. Enjoy over rice.
